channel.title: Pages on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Geoff Dixon > Write-Verbose

item.title: About
item.description: This is my personal technology blog. Every now and then I work on something interesting that seems worth recording here. I’m not great at sharing, but I’m working on it. Disclaimers: All views expressed are soley my own Product reviews are based on real experience Scripts and guides should be implemented in a test environment before production Posts are at a point in time and should be verified against latest product changes
